chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1825 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.854/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on statement dated 20.02.2024 (Withdrawal) 22.02.2024 Mr. Gul Feroze Kalwar, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is granted. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition. Such statement dated 20.02.2024, duly supported by an affidavit of petitioner, is also on record. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
